
Proportion Female at Length {data-navmenu="Fits to Data"}
=====================================

Row
-------------------------------------

### Observed and Predicted Proportion Female at Length

```{r pf_yearly_grid}
pf         <- mv$prop_female_at_length
pf_fleets  <- unique(pf$fleet)
pf_has_stk <- "stock" %in% names(pf) && length(unique(pf$stock)) > 1L
pf_stocks  <- if (pf_has_stk) unique(pf$stock) else NULL
pf_has_q   <- "quarter" %in% names(pf) && length(unique(pf$quarter)) > 1L
n_col_pf   <- 8L

panel_list <- list()
for (fl in pf_fleets) {
  for (stk in if (!is.null(pf_stocks)) pf_stocks else list(NULL)) {
    sub <- pf[pf$fleet == fl, , drop = FALSE]
    if (!is.null(stk)) sub <- sub[sub$stock == stk, , drop = FALSE]
    if (nrow(sub) == 0L) next

    lbl <- if (!is.null(stk)) paste(fl, stk, sep = " - ") else fl
    sub$year_q <- if (pf_has_q) paste0(sub$year, "-", sub$quarter) else
                    as.character(sub$year)

    n_yrq  <- length(unique(sub$year_q))
    n_row  <- ceiling(n_yrq / n_col_pf)
    h_fl   <- max(320L, 122L * n_row + 90L)

    p <- mv_plot_comp_grid(
      df             = sub,
      bin_col        = "length",
      ylab           = "Proportion female",
      ncol           = n_col_pf,
      years_per_page = Inf,
      year_col       = "year_q"
    )
    p <- layout(p = p, title = lbl, margin = list(t = 50), height = h_fl)
    p <- plotly::config(p, responsive = FALSE, displaylogo = FALSE,
      modeBarButtonsToRemove = c("select2d", "lasso2d", "autoScale2d"))
    p$height <- h_fl
    panel_list[[length(panel_list) + 1L]] <- htmltools::div(
      style = paste0("height:", h_fl, "px; margin-bottom:10px;"), p
    )
  }
}

htmltools::tagList(panel_list)
```
